posts.text: Happy Nowruz! My haft seen this year also honors the Iranians that were killed 🖤

My latest update on the Iran war that has now stretched into Nowruz, the Iranian New Year
substack.com/home/post/p-191…
A beautiful sign appears in the sky over Tehran on #Nowruz: A rainbow.

The organization @HRANA_English just dropped its annual report for the Iranian calendar year (March 2025-March 2026), looking at human rights violations in Iran, and it looks grim: 78,126+ individuals were arrested, and 2,488+ individuals were executed. en-hrana.org/a-statistical-o…

Senior Trump administration official: “Israel is pursuing a scorched-earth campaign of regime change, which is not what our goal is. Bibi wants to wreck Iran’s economy and decimate its energy infrastructure. Trump wants to keep it intact.” washingtonpost.com/national-…

👀


The Spectator Index (@spectatorindex)

BREAKING: Netanyahu says the Iranian regime 'may survive', but it will be 'much weaker'.



— https://nitter.net/spectatorindex/status/2034710820048052540#m

Interesting comments from the Treasury Secretary


Open Source Intel (@Osint613)

Treasury Sec. Scott Bessent on Iran:

"We are seeing the defections at all levels. They sense what's going on...we've seen where they wired their money out. We're coming for that, and will get it back to the Iranian people!"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Osint613/status/2034671552009056574#m
